easter-nest-for-kitchen-robot-teleculina.name: Easter Nest For Kitchen Robot
easter-nest-for-kitchen-robot-teleculina.original_name: Ninho da Páscoa para Robot de Cozinha
instructions: Make the cream: Lay the sugar on the robot's glass, add the flour, water, yolks and eggs and turn on 5 seconds at speed 5. Then attach the mixer accessory and program at 90oC for 4 minutes at speed 4. Remove immediately into a bowl and let it cool.

Start the oven at 180 degrees. Fill a hole with margarine and sprinkle it with flour. Wash the glass, clean it, lay the eggs, sugar and margarine and turn 30 seconds at speed 6. Then add the flour mixed with the yeast, turn on another 30 seconds at speed 6, lie down in shape and take it to the oven for about 40 minutes. Stick a toothpick to check the cooking, remove it from the oven and let it cool.

Then cut the cake in half to get two slices, bar the bottom with 1/3 of the cream, replace the top and bar the whole cake with the remaining cream. Spread the egg threads over and inside the hole, decorate with varied almonds and serve.

eclairs-teleculinaria.name: Eclairs

ingredients.item: Para cobrir  chocolate branco e negro derretidos

instructions: Prepare the cream: mix the yolks with the moreena flour and the sugar tea cup. Take the water with the 200 g of sugar to the flame, until you get weak pearl point.
Add the syrup to the mixture of the gems, in thread and always stirring, lie back in the pot and bring the heat to thicken, without stopping stirring. Take it off and let it cool.
Add the syrup to the mixture of the gems, in thread and always stirring, lie back in the pot and bring the heat to thicken, without stopping stirring. Take it off and let it cool.

Lay the dough in a bowl and add the eggs, one by one, always beating. Place it in a pastry bag with frizzy or smooth mouth and, on a tray lined with vegetable paper, form small strips. Take it in the oven, preheated to 180oC, for about 20 minutes or until it gets golden, then remove and let it cool.
With the help of a knife, drill a hole in one of the ends of each eclair and stuff them with the cream. Dip the top in melted white and black chocolate, let it dry and serve.

egg-bhurji-strata.name: Egg Bhurji Strata

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: white and pale green parts only, thinly sliced
leaves and tender stems coarsely chopped, plus more for serving
preferably day-old, cut or torn into 1" pieces (about 5 cups)

instructions: Butter an 8x8" or 9x9" baking dish with unsalted butter.
Whisk 7 large eggs, 1¾ cups whole milk, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium bowl until well combined. Season with freshly ground black pepper and set aside.

Heat 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter and 2 tsp. vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium until butter is melted. Cook ½ tsp. cumin seeds, stirring constantly, until fragrant and starting to pop, about 1 minute. Reduce heat to medium-low and add 2 large leeks, white and pale green parts only, thinly sliced; season with salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, until leeks are very soft and starting to brown, 8–10 minutes. Increase heat to medium and add 1 medium red bell pepper, cut into ½" pieces. Cook, stirring often, until pepper is beginning to soften, about 3 minutes. Add 4 garlic cloves, finely grated, and one 1" piece ginger, peeled, finely grated, and cook, stirring constantly, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add 1 tsp. garam masala, 1 tsp. ground coriander, 1 tsp. ground cumin, ½ tsp. ground turmeric, and ½ tsp. mild chile powder and cook, stirring constantly, until fragrant, about 1 minute.

Scrape mixture into a large bowl and let cool slightly. Stir in ½ medium bunch cilantro, leaves and tender stems coarsely chopped, ¼ medium red onion, chopped, 9 oz. sourdough bread, preferably day-old, cut or torn into 1" pieces, and 1½ cups coarsely grated sharp cheddar; season with salt and pepper. Transfer to prepared baking dish and spread out into an even layer. Pour reserved egg mixture over; gently press down on strata to help bread absorb egg mixture. Scatter remaining ½ cup coarsely grated sharp cheddar over. Cover strata and chill at least 1 hour and up to 12 hours.

Preheat oven to 350°. Bake strata until top is golden brown and a knife inserted into center comes out clean, 45–50 minutes. Let cool slightly, then cut into squares. Serve topped with more cilantro and Cilantro Chutney, if desired.
Do Ahead: Strata can be baked 3 days ahead. Let cool completely; cover and chill. Reheat in a 375° oven until hot, 20–25 minutes.

egg-salad-tartines-with-mixed-herbs.name: Egg Salad Tartines With Mixed Herbs
instructions: Combine egg yolk, mustard, and a pinch of salt in a medium bowl. Anchor bowl by setting it inside a towel-lined saucepan, which will afford you 2 free hands—1 for pouring and 1 for whisking. Whisk until very smooth.

Combine olive and vegetable oils in a measuring glass and pour into yolk mixture, drop by drop at first, then in a slow steady stream as mixture stiffens, until all the oil has been added. Whisk in vinegar and hot sauce; season with salt and pepper. Thin mayo with water if needed, adding a teaspoonful at a time until just loose enough to fall off a spoon.

Gently lower eggs into a large saucepan of boiling salted water, and cook, maintaining an active simmer, 9 minutes. Immediately transfer eggs with a slotted spoon to a bowl of ice water and stir until cool enough to handle, about 1 minute. Drain, pat dry, and peel eggs. Tear eggs into large pieces and add to mayonnaise. Gently fold just to coat; season with salt and pepper. Spoon over bread.
Toss scallions, basil, dill, chives, and lemon zest in a small bowl. Add lemon juice, drizzle with oil, and season with salt. Toss to coat. Pile herbs on top of egg.

egg-lemon-chicken-soup-argiro.name: Egg-lemon Chicken Soup

1 cup of karolin rice or glaze Washed

One or two clones. cellery or cellery

Add the vegetarians whole.

Strain the broth and remove the vegetarians.
Return the broth to the pot and as soon as it boils, add the rice and bottle for 15 minutes.
Salt and pepper. We remove the vehicle from the house and wait for the boat to drop before adding the eggmeal.
If we use cornflare, dissolve it in lemon juice.
Beat the whites in a bowl to fluffy well.
Add the yolks, one by one, starring with the wire and slowly add the lemon juice, Always continuing to mix.
Dilute grandly with hot chicken broth (2 seeds) the egg mixture, starring consistently to balance the temperature so that the egg does not cut.
Pour the Chicken soup with the eggmeal by mixing with the sponge to incorporate primarily.
Leave the pot in the kitchen eye over very low heat (in 1) for a few minutes, stringing regularly.
Serve the soup in hot dishes by adding some chicken looking and sprinkle with olive oil.
Serve separately the rest of the culture with its vegetables.

eggless-coffee-cake.name: Eggless Coffee Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9x9 inch baking pan.

In a large mixing bowl resift flour with the baking powder, baking soda, salt and 3/4 cup of sugar. In a separate bowl combine the egg replacer and water (2 eggs' worth) and mix in sour cream substitute and vanilla. Pour the 'egg' mixture into the flour mixture and beat until smooth. Spread batter in baking pan. Sprinkle blueberries (optional) and/or walnuts (optional) over the batter, and stir slightly so that they stay in the top layer.
In a small bowl, combine the 5 tablespoons sugar, margarine and cinnamon. Mix with a fork until mixture resembles cornmeal (not smooth). Sprinkle topping over batter.
Bake in preheated oven for 20 to 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean. Cool slightly before serving.

elbow-pasta-with-zucchini-and-tuna-telec.name: Elbow Pasta With Zucchini And Tuna
elbow-pasta-with-zucchini-and-tuna-telec.original_name: Massa cotovelos com curgete e atum
instructions: Peel the garlic and the onion, pick the garlic and cut the onion into half-moons. Wash and cut the curlets in circles. Wash and cut the tomatoes into cubs.

In a pot, put the olive oil, garlic the onion, take it to the fire and let it saute, stirring. Add the curlets, let cook for 3 minutes and add the tuna, tomato, season with salt and pepper and let cook for 3 more minutes.
In another pan, cooks the doughnut in salt-tempered water for 10 minutes, removes from the fire and drain. Add the tune preparation to the folder, wrap well and serve hot.

enchilada-casserole-with-red-guajillo-ch.name: Enchilada Casserole With Red Guajillo Chile Sauce

ingredients.item: Mexican guajillo red chile cooking sauce

instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).

Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook and stir beef in the hot skillet, sprinkling in pepper and taco seasoning, until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes. Add onion, bell peppers, and carrots; saute for 5 minutes.
Pour guajillo sauce into a large measuring cup and stir in sugar. Pour sauce over the beef mixture; stir in black beans.
Place 3 tortillas on the bottom of a casserole dish. Add half the meat mixture on top. Sprinkle 1/2 of the shredded cheese on top. Repeat the layers, ending with cheese on top.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese is melted and golden brown, about 25 minutes.

english-cake-teleculinaria.name: English Cake
instructions: Cut the crystallized fruit into very small pieces and moisturize them in water. Reserve. Put on an English cake form with butter, line the bottom with vegetal paper and put it back on. Sprinkle with flour and reserve.
Beat the butter with the sugar, add the citrus shaving and stir. Add the eggs, one by one, always beating until they're well incorporated. Add the flour and yeast and mix.
Coat the crystallized fruit, dry it with absorbent paper and pass it through flour. Then add to the dough and wrap.

Put the dough in shape and put it in the oven, preheated at 180oC, for about 40 to 45 minutes. Take it off and let it cool down a little before you deform. Serve the cake sprinkled with powdered sugar.

enjoy-a-cucumber-and-yogurt-carpaccio-in.name: Enjoy A Cucumber And Yogurt Carpaccio In Just A Few Minutes
enjoy-a-cucumber-and-yogurt-carpaccio-in.original_name: Disfruta de un carpaccio de pepino y yogurt en pocos minutos

Sea salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Wash and dry the cucumber. With the help of a mandolin or sharp knife, cut cucumber into very thin sheets throughout or in circles as you prefer.
Put cucumbers in a paddle and add a pint of salt. Let them rest 10 minutes to get rid of their excess water. Then put them with absorbing paper.
In a bowl, mix yogurt, lemon juice and fringes, mustard, olive oil, frosted garlic (if used), dill and a pint of salt and pepper. Mix to fully integrate.
On a large plate or two individual plates, distribute cucumbers into a circle or fan. Can overlap slightly.
Add small spoons of yogurt sauce onto cucumbers or asparcels with a decorative spoon.
It ends with roasted seeds, an extra chorrit of olive oil and, if you wish, a little more dill or minced fresh mint.
It's cold, preferably at the moment.

Flettle the heart of the artichokes till she's tipsy.
